market_context: X sentiment remains bullish on tech and AI names with futures pointing to a higher open. Low VIX and positive 5-day trends support continuation while crypto stability adds risk-on tone.

predictions.reasoning: Pre-market futures up 0.4% and continued X optimism around AI earnings should drive SPY higher into the close following the recent 3.5% 5-day gain.
Tech leadership and positive options flow on NVDA/MSFT visible on X point to outperformance for QQQ today.
Heavy bullish mentions on X and strong pre-market momentum in semis support NVDA closing above 210.
